inputDescription: Paste JavaScript, TypeScript, JSON, HTML, CSS, Markdown, YAML, GraphQL, or related files and format them in the browser with Prettier.
outputDescription: The preview uses the selected Prettier parser and options below.
outputEmptyDescription: Paste or import source code on the left to preview the formatted output here.
optionsDescription: Choose the parser and style rules without editing the source by hand.
formatPausedHint: Large input detected. Automatic formatting is paused to keep editing responsive.
